idea: Reduce 330ml aluminium can body gauge from 0.245mm to 0.235mm after supplier validation and burst-pressure testing.
dependency: Supplier validation, QA sign-off, line trial
risk_notes: Potential denting risk during logistics if gauge reduction is too aggressive.
constraint_notes: Must pass transport simulation and shelf-life stability tests.
success_metric: Material cost per 1,000 cans reduced without increase in damage rate

idea: Replace full-color carton artwork with two-color flexo print for secondary packaging used in distributor-only channels.
risk_notes: Brand team may resist reduced visual appeal.
constraint_notes: Do not apply to modern trade or premium channels.
success_metric: Printing cost reduction with no distributor complaint increase

idea: Consolidate PET label suppliers from four vendors to two strategic vendors with quarterly volume-based price locks.
risk_notes: Supplier concentration can increase disruption risk.
constraint_notes: Keep at least one backup supplier for business continuity.
success_metric: Average label price per unit reduced while OTIF remains above 97%

idea: Use lightweight stretch film for pallet wrapping and adjust wrapping pattern from 24 rotations to 18 rotations after stability testing.
constraint_notes: Must pass drop, tilt, and vibration tests.
success_metric: Stretch film usage per pallet reduced without increase in damage claims

idea: Introduce predictive maintenance alerts for filler machine valves using downtime logs and sensor threshold patterns.
dependency: Sensor data access, maintenance history, ML model validation
risk_notes: False alerts may reduce operator trust.
constraint_notes: Start with advisory mode before automated maintenance scheduling.
success_metric: Unplanned downtime hours reduced by at least 8%

idea: Switch export cartons from virgin kraft to approved recycled-content kraft for non-premium SKUs.
risk_notes: Recycled material may vary in strength and appearance.
constraint_notes: Do not use for premium SKUs or humid-route exports until tested.
success_metric: Carton cost reduced and compression strength remains within specification

idea: Optimize truck loading by grouping orders by route cluster and pallet height compatibility to reduce partial-load dispatches.
risk_notes: May delay urgent orders if route batching is too strict.
success_metric: Truck utilization increased and cost per case delivered reduced

idea: Replace manual invoice exception review with rule-based triage plus AI summary for top recurring mismatch reasons.
dependency: AP exception data, ERP access, approval workflow
constraint_notes: Human approval required for payment-impacting exceptions.
success_metric: Manual review time reduced and payment error rate unchanged

idea: Shift low-volume SKU production to a fixed monthly campaign schedule to reduce changeover frequency.
dependency: Demand planning alignment, inventory buffer policy
risk_notes: Higher finished-goods inventory for slow movers.
constraint_notes: Do not increase expiry or obsolete stock risk.
success_metric: Changeover hours reduced while service level remains stable

idea: Introduce demand-sensing reorder recommendations for regional distributors using sell-out trend, seasonality, and promo calendar signals.
dependency: Distributor data sharing, forecast model, integration with order workflow
risk_notes: Poor distributor data quality can reduce recommendation accuracy.
constraint_notes: Recommendations should be advisory, not auto-ordering in phase one.
success_metric: Stockout rate reduced and distributor inventory days optimized

idea: Create a reusable supplier scorecard that combines cost variance, defect rate, delivery delay, and contract compliance.
dependency: Supplier master data, PO history, quality claims
risk_notes: Incomplete supplier data can create unfair scoring.
constraint_notes: Scores must be explainable and reviewed by sourcing managers.
success_metric: Improved supplier negotiation pipeline and fewer repeat supplier issues

idea: Do not reduce packaging quality for premium gift packs; instead renegotiate inner tray tooling cost through multi-year volume commitment.
constraint_notes: Preserve premium unboxing experience and artwork standards.
success_metric: Tooling amortization cost reduced without packaging downgrade

idea: Deploy an agent to read maintenance tickets, classify root causes, and suggest recurring failure themes to engineering leads weekly.
dependency: Ticket data, taxonomy design, engineering feedback loop
risk_notes: Model may hallucinate root causes without evidence.
constraint_notes: Every recommendation must include ticket references and confidence score.
success_metric: Repeat failures reduced and time-to-root-cause improved

idea: Standardize cap color across three low-volume SKUs to reduce cap inventory variants and minimum-order-quantity waste.
risk_notes: Consumers may notice color change in some channels.
constraint_notes: Only apply where regulatory and brand identity requirements allow.
success_metric: Cap SKU count reduced and obsolete inventory lowered

idea: Use AI-assisted tender comparison to summarize supplier deviations from standard contract terms and highlight hidden cost clauses.
dependency: Tender documents, legal clause library, approval workflow
risk_notes: Legal interpretation must not be fully automated.
constraint_notes: Legal team review mandatory before supplier award decision.
success_metric: Tender review cycle time reduced and cost leakage avoided
